creator: gerald@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Piotr Kubaj from comment #8)
> libcpp change is a backport of ...

Ah, lovely. This would have been useful to mention earlier. ;-)

I checked out the GCC 10 branch and noticed this is already there, so
lang/gcc10-devel has it already and the next minor release of GCC 10
will bring this to lang/gcc10.


Do you want to go ahead and commit the libcpp patch to lang/gcc10,
mentioning the above?

Approved by: gerald (maintainer)
